title: M. Murat Ardag, Ph.D.
text:
Welcome to the landing page of my various websites.

About Me
I am a former academic turned data scientist, now freelancing at the intersection of AI and cybersecurity.





View My Services

  
    
    For Businesses
    Workshops, cybersecurity, AI red teaming, and executive advisory for startups, SMEs, and tech teams.
    Explore 
  
  
    
    For Non-Profits
    Workshops and data products for NGOs, think tanks, and policy institutes.
    Explore 
  



Explore My Work
Some of my projects are available on GitHub  and HuggingFace  Browsing my portfolio projects is another option.





More About Me
Read about my professional journey.
To find out more about me as the political psychologist, visit my academic website.
I occasionally make blogposts.
Feel free to connect on LinkedIn  .

title: Services for Businesses
text:
Services for Businesses




  
    
    Awareness & Enablement Workshops
    For Startups & Tech Teams
    
      Security-first culture for fast-moving teams: phishing resilience, credential hygiene, and safe use of SaaS and AI assistants, tailored to engineering workflows.
      Cybersecurity for GenAI systems: addressing common vulnerabilities and third-party model risk in production LLM systems.
    
    For SMEs
    
      AI & cybersecurity fundamentals for non-technical staff: a plain-language briefing on the technologies, threat landscape, the regulatory obligations that apply, and the practical steps an organization can take without in-house teams.
    
  

  
    
    Executive Advisory (1:1)
    For Startup & SME Leadership: CEOs, CTOs, CISOs, CDOs, Heads of Data
    
      Governance, Risk & Compliance: aligning AI adoption with EU AI Act obligations, risk frameworks, and board-level reporting.
      Threat intelligence & OSINT for decision-makers: translating the current threat landscape into specific exposure for specific sectors and supply chains.
    
  

  
    
    Offensive Security & AI Red Teaming
    For SMEs
    
      AI red teaming: conduct rigorous adversarial testing of LLM-based applications to proactively map and mitigate common threats.
      Web application pentesting: vulnerability discovery and exploitation across web apps, APIs, and supporting infrastructure, with remediation guidance that developers can use.
    
  

  
    
    Custom Engagements
    Get in touch to discuss bespoke scopes
  



How engagements work
    
      Scoping call: a free 30-minute conversation to clarify objectives, constraints, and the outcomes you need.
      Written proposal: a statement of work covering scope, timeline, deliverables, and fees.
      Delivery: execution against the agreed plan, with regular check-ins and a written handover at close.
    

All engagements are in English, remote or on-site. Workshops run as half-day, full-day, or multi-session formats.

Book a call

title: M. Murat Ardag, Ph.D.
text:
At BCW Global, Europe & Africa1 I worked with teams across the EU and UK to develop three products. I also provided comprehensive data analysis and strategic insights to client teams throughout the EMEA region.
While working in the private sector, I volunteered as the Turkish Language Group Leader in the European Commission Joint Research Centre’s ValuesML - Unravelling Expressed Values in the Media for Informed Policy Making project.
My academic background is in political psychology2, with expertise in psychometrics, psycholinguistics, cross-cultural research, and modeling human subjectivity.
My academic role, prior to transitioning to the private sector, had placed me at the intersection of research and industry. I led the data analysis for a major externally-funded project, fostering a collaboration between a multinational consulting firm and teams from several universities.
In another life, before becoming an academic, I worked as a sales manager at a multinational outdoor advertising company in Istanbul. During my undergrad studies, I worked as a music journalist.

title: M. Murat Ardag, Ph.D.
text:

title: Services for Non-Profits
text:
Services for Non-Profits




  
    
    Awareness & Enablement Workshops
    NGOs, Think Tanks & Policy Institutes
    
      AI & cybersecurity for non-technical teams: accessible grounding in the threats. Includes secure communications, source protection, account hardening, and recognition of targeted threats against journalists, researchers, and advocacy staff.
      Disinformation & information manipulation literacy: detecting coordinated inauthentic behavior, AI-generated content, and narrative laundering, including attribution and response frameworks, grounded in the latest EU evidence base on foreign information manipulation & interference and platform-driven polarization.
      Operational resilience: protecting staff, sources, and sensitive data against targeted and opportunistic attacks.
    
  

  
    
    Custom Data Products
    NGOs, Think Tanks & Policy Institutes
    
      Dashboards & automated workflows: from raw data to publication-ready outputs, built to be maintainable by non-engineers.
      Research design & analysis: quantitative and mixed-methods grounded in an academic research background, tailored to policy-relevant questions.
      Media/narrative analysis: aligned to organizational objectives, including OSINT-driven investigations.
    
  

  
    
    Custom Engagements
    Get in touch to discuss bespoke scopes
  



How engagements work
    
      Scoping call: a free 30-minute conversation to clarify objectives, constraints, and the outcomes you need.
      Written proposal: a statement of work covering scope, timeline, deliverables, and fees.
      Delivery: execution against the agreed plan, with regular check-ins and a written handover at close.
    

All engagements are in English, remote or on-site. Workshops run as half-day, full-day, or multi-session formats.
